Headline: #106 East 103rd Temporary Reroute at 103rd/Woodlawn
ShortDescription: 106 East 103rd buses are temp. rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 103rd/Woodlawn.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#106 East 103rd buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 103rd, Woodlawn, 111th, Cottage Grove, 103rd and over normal route due to street blockage near 103rd/Woodlawn.

Allow extra travel time.
